title: Nerf Dog 3-Ring Rubber Tug Toy, 10.5-Inch Lightweight Water-Resistant Interactive Toy for Dogs, Blue/Green/Orange
features: NERF-TOUGH: Nerf-quality materials make our 3-Ring Tug toy perfect for fetch and for teaching your dog new tricks
MADE TO LAST: Lightweight, durable, and weather & water resistant
FOR MEDIUM AND LARGE BREEDS: At 10.5 inches long, these Multi-Rings are ideal for medium and large breeds
SAFETY FIRST: Designed with you dog's safety in mind, each of our dog toys are tested to ensure endless hours of family fun

description: From the brand Durable fetch toys engineered for long-distance, water and tug play - buoyant balls, blasters and tugs with reinforced stitching. Previous page NERF Dog Durable Fetch Toys NERF Dog blends iconic play principles with rugged design to create fetch-focused dog toys built for real-world play. Engineered for long-distance throws, water retrieval and tough tugs, the range uses buoyant, quick-dry materials, reinforced stitching and high-impact components to withstand active dogs. Widely stocked, NERF Dog prioritises safety, cleanability and lasting fun. What is NERF Dog about? Play-first design for active dogs - durable fetch, tug and water toys engineered for safety, easy cleaning and lasting fun. How do you ensure durability? Reinforced stitching, high-impact materials and real-world play testing help our toys withstand regular, energetic use. Are the toys safe? Yes. Materials and construction follow safety-first principles. Supervise play and retire toys that show damage. Next page
